feed.title: MSFS Blog
feed.subtitle: Development updates of Microsoft Flight Simulator.

entry.title: Developer Highlight: Taog’s Hangar and the UH-1H Huey
entry.summary: Few aircraft in aviation history are as instantly recognizable as the Bell UH-1H Huey. In Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024, this legendary helicopter is now taking to the skies in partnership with Taog’s Hangar, a developer known for high-fidelity, community-driven rotorcraft. Download the Stranger Things Expansion for FREE and fly the Huey through its dedicated missions … Continued

entry.title: Creator Highlight, January 2026 – CowTown
entry.summary: We’re continuing our Creator Highlight series in 2026 and are starting the new year in style, featuring popular YouTuber CowTown! Having started content creation a decade ago, CowTown (Tim) has switched his focus to Microsoft Flight Simulator in recent years. Sitting at just shy of 50’000 subscribers, Tim’s passion for our community shines through in … Continued

entry.title: Creator Highlight, February 2026 – FlyWithLado
entry.summary: For our February Creator Highlight, we’re focusing on popular video creator FlyWithLado! Having amassed a ginormous following of over 540,000 Instagram users and many more on different platforms, FlyWithLado is redefining content creation for social media in our community.We asked them some questions to give you all a behind the scenes look at their content:Do … Continued

entry.title: Marketplace Update Week of March 23, 2026
entry.summary: Jump to: MSFS 2020 Releases ↓ | Marketplace Backlog ↓Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 First Party New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New Products New on PC and Xbox New on PC New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on … Continued

entry.title: March 26th, 2026 MSFS Weekly Briefing
entry.summary: Weekly Recap Many members of the MSFS team were in Lelystad, Netherlands last week for the annual FSWeekend event! We welcomed thousands of event attendees to have hands-on time with Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 on PC, Xbox Series X, and PlayStation 5 Pro using a variety of flight control peripherals from vendors such as Honeycomb … Continued

entry.title: Now Available in the MSFS 2024 Marketplace: The IniBuilds Tristar Airliner
entry.summary: We are excited to announce that the iniBuilds TriStar Airliner is now available in the Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 Marketplace for $49.99 USD!The iniBuilds TriStar Airliner for Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 brings a true classic of long-haul aviation into the simulator, recreated with exceptional attention to detail. Every aspect of the aircraft has been carefully … Continued

entry.title: Spring Sale: Microsoft Flight Simulator (2020) and Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024
entry.summary: Our Spring Sale in the Microsoft Flight Simulator Marketplace is now live!

entry.title: April 2nd, 2026 MSFS Weekly Briefing
entry.summary: Weekly RecapThe entire Microsoft Flight Simulator Team wishes godspeed to the crew of Artemis II on their historic space flight to the moon! We know many of you watched the launch yesterday, and if you’re interested in celebrating this mission some more, be sure to join our Community Fly-In Friday group flight this week as … Continued

entry.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator Releases Local Legend 23: The Fokker F27 Friendship
entry.summary: Fast, quiet, and boasting a pressurized cabin, the F27 revolutionized regional aviation upon its debut in the late 1950s
